summary: CVX reported Q1 2026 earnings on May 1, 2026. EPS of $1.41 beat estimates of $1.17 by $0.24. Revenue of $48.6B missed estimates of $53B. Production increased ~500K BOE/day vs 2025. Adjusted FCF $4.1B; share repurchases $2.5B. Downstream earnings hit by ~$3B unfavorable timing effects from rapid commodity price increases. Company says less exposed to Iran war than peers.
